message:
🌱 Add clickhouse: UDF support mission (#990)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "clickhouse-11-udf-support",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "clickhouse: UDF support",
+    "description": "UDF support. Requested by 50+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current ClickHouse setup",
+        "description": "Verify your ClickHouse version:\n```bash\nclickhouse-client --version\n```\nUDF support requires ClickHouse 21.10+ for SQL UDFs."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review UDF support",
+        "description": "ClickHouse supports User Defined Functions in two forms:\n1. **SQL UDFs** - Lambda-based functions defined in SQL\n2. **Executable UDFs** - External programs that process data"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Create a UDF",
+        "description": "Create a SQL-based UDF:\n```sql\nCREATE FUNCTION linear_equation AS (x, k, b) -> k * x + b;\n\nSELECT linear_equation(2, 3, 4);\n```\n\nFor executable UDFs, configure in `*_function.xml`:\n```xml\n<functions>\n    <function>\n        <type>executable</type>\n        <name>my_udf</name>\n        <return_type>String</return_type>\n        <argument><type>String</type></argument>\n        <format>TabSeparated</format>\n        <command>my_script.sh</command>\n    </function>\n</functions>\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify UDF works",
+        "description": "Test your UDF:\n```sql\nSELECT linear_equation(10, 2, 5);\nSHOW CREATE FUNCTION linear_equation;\n```\nConfirm the function returns expected results."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "ClickHouse added User Defined Function (UDF) support, including SQL-based lambda functions and executable UDFs.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "clickhouse",
+      "community",
+      "analytics-db",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "clickhouse"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/11",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/pull/2887"
+    },
+    "reactions": 50,
+    "comments": 9,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "clickhouse-client"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working ClickHouse installation (21.10+ for SQL UDFs)."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:48:37.694Z",

+    "sanitized": true,

+}
